zh.lifeSummary: John de Trim出生在愛爾蘭。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John de Trim出生在爱尔兰。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English trim ‘smart, neatly dressed’, though the word is poorly evidenced in medieval sources.
English: from the Middle English personal name Trim (Old English Trymma, a derivative of trum ‘strong’).
Irish: habitational name from Trim (Meath). This is one of the very few Irish habitational names.

variants.name: Trimnal
meanings: Altered form of English Trimnell: from the Middle English personal name Trimenel, a double diminutive of Trim (Old English Trymma).

variants.name: Trimm
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Trim  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John de Trim was born in Ireland. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: John de Trim est né à Irlande. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: John de Trim wurde in Irland geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: John de Trim è nato il nel Irlanda. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Trimはアイルランドで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Trim(은)는 아일랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: John de Trim nasceu em Irlanda. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: John de Trim родился в местности Ирландия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: John de Trim nació en Irlanda. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
